prestazioni: F4Rt 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 (engine code: F4R 874) upgraded with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, supporting 300+ HP with a custom BorgWarner EFR 6258 turbo manifold and 3-inch stainless steel downpipe from Milltek Sport

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom valving for the Clio RS chassis, and adjustable top mounts for camber/caster optimization (specifically tuned for the B95 platform)

AP Racing CP8370-1000 356mm 4-piston front brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a custom stainless steel braided brake line setup from Goodridge and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid for fade resistance
estetica: Seibon Carbon Fiber widebody conversion kit (Clio RS V-spec front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper flares) with custom 5-axis CNC-machined aluminum reinforcement plates for chassis rigidity
Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit (front bumper, side skirts, and GT-style rear wing) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and OEM+ gloss black accents on the mirror caps and roof

Recaro SPG XL bucket seats with custom Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, mounted on custom aluminum seat sliders from Corbeau, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede) and NRG quick-release hub
